prompt: I have a messy Downloads folder at evals/files/test-downloads/ with mixed file types. Organize these files into a clean folder structure by type and suggest a naming convention.
expectations: Proposes organizing files by type (documents, images, spreadsheets, etc.)
Suggests a date-based or descriptive naming convention
Provides a script or code to perform the organization
Uses pathlib or shutil for file operations (not raw os.system calls)
Handles edge cases like duplicate filenames
